info.title: Yuno Payments API
info.description:
The Yuno Payments API is built around REST principles, using standard HTTP methods and JSON payloads.

## Authentication
All requests require two headers:
```
public-api-key: YOUR_PUBLIC_KEY
private-secret-key: YOUR_PRIVATE_KEY
```

## Idempotency
Payment mutations (create, capture, cancel, refund, payout) require an `X-Idempotency-Key` header (UUID).
The API stores the key and returns the same response for duplicate requests within 24 hours.

## Environments
| Environment | Base URL |
|-------------|----------|
| Sandbox | `https://api-sandbox.y.uno/v1` |
| Production | `https://api.y.uno/v1` |

post.description:
Creates a checkout session to initialize the Yuno SDK.
Pass the returned `checkout_session` to `Yuno.initialize()` on the front-end.
Creates an enrollment session token. Pass to the Yuno SDK to vault a card.

Creates a payment.

- `capture: true` — single-step: authorize and charge immediately.
- `capture: false` — two-step: authorize only, charge later via **Capture Authorization**.

get.summary: Get Payment by Merchant Order ID

post.description: Captures a previously authorized payment. Charges the customer.
Cancels an authorized (not yet captured) payment, releasing the held funds.

Issues a full or partial refund.

Omit `amount` for a full refund. Include `amount` for a partial refund.

> Do not run multiple simultaneous refunds on the same transaction.
Smart endpoint — cancels if authorized-only, refunds if already captured.
Creates a hosted payment page. Returns `checkout_url` — share with your customer.

Creates a recurring billing subscription.

**Prerequisite:** Enroll a card first to obtain `vaulted_token`.

**frequency.type:** `DAY` | `WEEK` | `MONTH`
Manually retry a failed billing cycle.

Generates an asynchronous report. Poll **Get Report** until `status: COMPLETED`, then download.

**Dates must be exactly 24 characters:** `2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z`

Returns a real-time FX rate for dynamic currency conversion (DCC).

Pass the returned `id` in the payment's `amount.currency_conversion.id` field.

**provider_data.id:** `CIBC` | `MERCADO_PAGO`

IdempotencyKey.name: X-Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Unique UUID per request. Prevents duplicate processing on retries.

OrgCode.name: X-Organization-Code
OrgCode.description: Required for all Reports API endpoints.

BadRequest.description: Invalid request — schema violation or missing required field

Currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, BRL, MXN)

capture.description: true = charge now, false = authorize only

amount.description: Include for partial refund. Omit for full refund.
